spec.objective: Author internal/subagent/codex/stream_parser.go — a JSONL event-stream parser for the Codex CLI '--json' output that extracts the final assistant message and normalises the OpenAI usage block (prompt_tokens -> InputTokens, completion_tokens -> OutputTokens, prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens -> CacheReadTokens, CacheCreationTokens fixed at 0 per D5). Uses common.ReadLines for the 16 MB per-line budget. Also author stream_parser_test.go with fixture JSONL that proves the usage mapping and the zero-CacheCreationTokens invariant fully offline — no OPENAI_API_KEY required.
